message:
feat(runtime): integrate RecordingManager into observation pipeline

Wire the recording engine into the observation runtime so that captured
segments and detection events are automatically recorded to disk when
a RecordingManager is configured.

runtime.rs:
- Add optional recording: Option<Arc<RecordingManager>> field to
  ObservationRuntime
- Add with_recording_manager() builder method (#[must_use])
- Clone recording Arc into the process_events spawned task
- After persisting each segment, call manager.record_segment() if
  recording is active (log warning on failure)
- After each detection, call manager.record_event() with pane_id,
  detection, and captured_at timestamp (log warning on failure)

main.rs:
- Import VecDeque and Instant for upcoming command implementations
  that need bounded history and timing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
